winner_macro_lane: authenticated customer -> product favorite -> favorites collection persistence
winner_truth: an authenticated customer can create a favorite row from product detail and reopen it after sign out and sign in
breadth_verdict: single-persistent-favorite-row; honest cap on multi-product breadth
business_verdict: owned persistent favorite row with customer separation and session reopenability

score.cap_reason: persistent favorite row is real, but second-product breadth, invoices, messages and order history remain unproved

run_vector.claim: authenticated customer creates one owned favorite row from product detail
favorite row reopens across account navigation and direct favorites route entry
favorite row persists after sign out and sign in
favorite ownership remains separated between guest and customer identities
favorites integrity rejects fake breadth when the same product identity reopens

next_frontier: authenticated customer -> favorite row -> adjacent commercial row such as invoice, order or message persistence
do_not_sell_as_closure: same-product related navigation as a second favorite object
empty invoices container as invoice ownership
empty messages container as support history
